name: metal storage hold
description: I'm in a metal storage hold
hints: A storage hold with fascinating contents - a motionless pirate, display cases, crates, and a pulsating red force field. Examine everything.
The pirate is motionless - they may be in stasis or dead. The display cases and crates may contain useful items. The red force field blocks an exit.
LOOK PIRATE, LOOK CASES, LOOK BOXES to examine the contents. The pulsating red force field must be disabled to exit. You may need to find controls elsewhere.
OPEN BOXES or LOOK CRATES to find items. The pirate may become active under certain conditions. Do NOT touch the pulsating red force field.
notes: Storage hold containing a motionless pirate (possibly in alien stasis), display cases, giant crates with supplies, and a pulsating red force field. No listed exits - must find a way through the force field or find hidden passages. The pirate is a key element from the Savage Island storyline.
